# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: vnet-threetier-dev
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
    minLength: 2
    maxLength: 64

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/16
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Virtual Network

  webSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: snet-web
    metadata:
      description: Name of the web tier subnet

  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.1.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the web tier subnet

  appSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: snet-app
    metadata:
      description: Name of the application tier subnet

  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.2.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the application tier subnet

  dbSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: snet-db
    metadata:
      description: Name of the database tier subnet

  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.3.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the database tier subnet

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    metadata:
      description: Environment tag for the resources

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat('nsg-', parameters('webSubnetName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: web
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
        - name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
        - name: Deny-All-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
        - name: Allow-App-Subnet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "8080"
        - name: Deny-VNet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
            destinationPortRange: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat('nsg-', parameters('appSubnetName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: app
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-Web-Subnet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "8080"
        - name: Deny-All-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
        - name: Allow-DB-Subnet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
        - name: Deny-VNet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
            destinationPortRange: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat('nsg-', parameters('dbSubnetName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: database
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-App-Subnet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
        - name: Deny-All-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
        - name: Deny-Internet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationPortRange: "*"
        - name: Deny-VNet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
            destinationPortRange: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: three-tier-application
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('webSubnetName')))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('appSubnetName')))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('dbSubnetName')))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      enableDdosProtection: false
      subnets:
        - name: "[parameters('webSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('webSubnetName')))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
        - name: "[parameters('appSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('appSubnetName')))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
        - name: "[parameters('dbSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('dbSubnetName')))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled

outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"

  vnetName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('vnetName')]"

  webSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('webSubnetName'))]"

  appSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('appSubnetName'))]"

  dbSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('dbSubnetName'))]"

  webNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('webSubnetName')))]"

  appNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('appSubnetName')))]"

  dbNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat('nsg-', parameters('dbSubnetName')))]"
